titles.en: Amīr al-mu’minīn's oath on divine truth
Amīr al-mu’minīn's oath on divine truth

segments: ٢٧٧. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): لَا وَالَّذِي أَمْسَيْنَا مِنْهُ فِي غُبْرِ لَيْلَةٍ دَهْمَاءَ تَكْشِرُعَنْ يَوْمٍ أَغَرَّ مَا كَان كَذَا وَكَذَا.
arabic.text: ٢٧٧. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): لَا وَالَّذِي أَمْسَيْنَا مِنْهُ فِي غُبْرِ لَيْلَةٍ دَهْمَاءَ تَكْشِرُعَنْ يَوْمٍ أَغَرَّ مَا كَان كَذَا وَكَذَا.

segments: 277. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: I swear by Him Who let us pass the dark night after which there was a bright day that such and such [1] did not happen.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: 277. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: I swear by Him Who let us pass the dark night after which there was a bright day that such and such [1] did not happen.
